issue_summary: Added support for Scala's Option type on repositories.
javadoc_before:
/**
 * Converters to potentially wrap the execution of a repository method into a variety of wrapper types potentially being
 * available on the classpath.
 * 
 * @author Oliver Gierke
 * @since 1.8
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Converters to potentially wrap the execution of a repository method into a variety of wrapper types potentially being * available on the classpath. Currently supported: *
    *
  • {@code java.util.Optional}
    • *
  • {@code com.google.common.base.Optional}
    • *
  • {@code scala.Option}
    • *
  • {@code java.util.concurrent.Future}
    • *
  • {@code java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture}
    • *
  • {@code org.springframework.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture<}
    • *
* * @author Oliver Gierke * @since 1.8 */
